title: Red Letter Patterns of Yeshua
description: A structured analysis of how Yeshua speaks across the four Gospels.

steps.title: How Yeshua Structures His Speech
steps.summary: Initial categorization of red-letter sayings into functional patterns.
reflection: Why does Yeshua ask so many questions?
Why does He rarely answer directly?

title: Matthew 5–7 — Sermon on the Mount (Red Letter Corpus)

units.text: Blessed are the poor in spirit, for theirs is the kingdom of heaven...
units.summary: Yeshua defines kingdom blessing through reversal of worldly status.

units.text: You are the salt of the earth... You are the light of the world...
units.summary: Identity-based teaching describing disciples' public function.

units.text: Do not think that I came to abolish the Law or the Prophets...
units.summary: Clarifies continuity of Torah and prophetic fulfillment.

units.text: You have heard that it was said... but I say to you...
units.summary: Internalizes commandment ethics from action to intent.

units.text: You have heard it said, you shall not commit adultery...
units.summary: Expands adultery from action to internal intention.

units.text: It was said, whoever divorces his wife...
units.summary: Reframes divorce teaching toward covenant seriousness.

units.text: Do not swear at all... let your yes be yes...
units.summary: Calls for integrity without oath escalation.

units.text: You have heard it said, eye for eye...
units.summary: Rejects escalation of vengeance; introduces non-retaliation.

units.text: Love your enemies and pray for those who persecute you...
units.summary: Extends love ethic beyond reciprocal relationships.

units.text: Beware of practicing righteousness before others...
units.summary: Private vs public righteousness in giving.

units.text: When you pray, do not be like the hypocrites...
units.summary: Defines private, sincere prayer over performative prayer.

units.text: Our Father in heaven, hallowed be Your name...
units.summary: Structured model of kingdom-aligned prayer.

units.text: Do not store up treasures on earth...
units.summary: Reorients value system toward eternal priority.

units.text: Do not worry about your life...
units.summary: Trust-based living in provision.

units.text: Do not judge, or you too will be judged...
units.summary: Judgment ethics and self-awareness before critique.

units.text: Ask and it will be given to you...
units.summary: Encouragement toward persistence in seeking.

units.text: Do to others what you would have them do to you...
units.summary: Ethical summary principle of Torah application.

units.text: Enter through the narrow gate...
units.summary: Two-path framework of life decision.

units.text: By their fruits you will recognize them...
units.summary: External behavior reveals internal reality.

units.text: Not everyone who says to me, 'Lord, Lord'...
units.summary: Distinguishes verbal profession from obedience.

units.text: Everyone who hears these words of mine and does them...
units.summary: Stability comes from obedience to teaching.

units.text: The crowds were astonished at his teaching...
units.summary: Audience reaction to authority-based teaching.
